# Clawperator Documentation

Compiled from the MkDocs navigation tree and assembled docs staging directory.

# Docs Home

Clawperator public docs are organized into Setup, API, Skills, and Troubleshooting.

Machine-readable entrypoints:

- [llms.txt](https://docs.clawperator.com/llms.txt)
- [llms-full.txt](https://docs.clawperator.com/llms-full.txt)

Use the section pages in the nav for the current canonical surface.

---

# Setup

Placeholder for the linear setup path.

This page will cover installation, device preparation, APK installation, permissions, doctor verification, and the first snapshot command.

---

# API

# API Overview

Placeholder for the high-level API contract.

This page will summarize the execution model, result envelope, and pointers to the dedicated reference pages.

---

# CLI Reference

This page is generated from the Node CLI registry and command sources.

## Command Summary

| Command | Aliases | Flags | Summary |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `operator` | - | --apk, --device, --operator-package, --help<br>Subcommands: setup, install | Install the Operator APK and configure the device |
| `setup` | - | --apk, --device, --operator-package | Alias guidance - use operator setup instead |
| `install` | - | --apk, --device, --operator-package | Alias guidance - use operator setup instead |
| `devices` | - | - | List connected Android devices |
| `emulator` | - | --name<br>Subcommands: list, inspect, create, start, stop, delete, status, provision | Manage Android emulators (AVDs) |
| `provision` | - | -<br>Subcommands: emulator | Provision an Android emulator |
| `packages` | - | --third-party, --device, --operator-package, --payload, --execution | List installed packages on a device |
| `exec` | execute | --payload, --execution, --validate-only, --dry-run, --goal, --device, --operator-package | Execute a validated command payload |
| `snapshot` | - | --device, --operator-package, --json | Get current Android UI hierarchy as XML |
| `screenshot` | - | --path, --device, --operator-package, --json | Capture a screenshot from the device |
| `click` | tap | --text, --text-contains, --id, --desc, --desc-contains, --role, --selector, --coordinate, --long, --focus, --device, --operator-package, --json | Tap the first matching UI element |
| `open` | open-uri, open-url | --app, --device, --operator-package, --json, --help | Open an app, URL, or URI on the device |
| `type` | fill | --text, --text-contains, --id, --desc, --desc-contains, --role, --selector, --submit, --clear, --device, --operator-package, --json, --help | Type text into the first matching UI element |
| `read` | - | --text, --text-contains, --id, --desc, --desc-contains, --role, --selector, --all, --container-text, --container-text-contains, --container-id, --container-desc, --container-desc-contains, --container-role, --container-selector, --device, --operator-package, --json | Read text from the first matching UI element |
| `wait` | - | --text, --text-contains, --id, --desc, --desc-contains, --role, --selector, --device, --operator-package, --timeout, --json | Wait until a matching UI element appears |
| `press` | press-key | --key, --device, --operator-package, --json, --help | Press a hardware key on the device |
| `back` | - | --device, --operator-package, --json, --app, --help | Press the Android back key |
| `close` | close-app | --app, --device, --operator-package, --json | Force-stop an Android application |
| `sleep` | - | --device, --operator-package, --json | Pause execution for a duration |
| `scroll` | - | --direction, --container-text, --container-text-contains, --container-id, --container-desc, --container-desc-contains, --container-role, --container-selector, --device, --operator-package, --json, --help, --click | Scroll the screen in a direction |
| `scroll-until` | - | --click, --direction, --text, --text-contains, --id, --desc, --desc-contains, --role, --selector, --container-text, --container-text-contains, --container-id, --container-desc, --container-desc-contains, --container-role, --container-selector, --device, --operator-package, --json | Scroll until a target element is visible |
| `scroll-and-click` | - | --direction, --text, --text-contains, --id, --desc, --desc-contains, --role, --selector, --container-text, --container-text-contains, --container-id, --container-desc, --container-desc-contains, --container-role, --container-selector, --click, --device, --operator-package, --json | Scroll until target is visible, then click it (alias for scroll-until --click) |
| `wait-for-nav` | wait-for-navigation | --app, --text, --text-contains, --id, --desc, --desc-contains, --role, --selector, --validate-only, --dry-run, --timeout, --device, --operator-package, --json | Wait for app or screen navigation to complete |
| `read-value` | read-kv | --label, --label-id, --label-desc, --all, --validate-only, --dry-run, --json | Read the value associated with a labeled element |
| `skills` | - | --app, --intent, --keyword, --skill-id, --artifact, --vars, --summary, --all, --dry-run, --device, --device-id, --operator-package, --receiver-package, --timeout, --timeout-ms, --expect-contains, --skip-validate, --ref, --json, --output<br>Subcommands: install, sync, new, validate, run | Manage and run automation skills |
| `recording` | record | --session-id, --out, --input, --device, --operator-package | Manage recording sessions on the Operator app |
| `serve` | - | --port, --host | Start local HTTP/SSE server for remote control |
| `doctor` | - | --fix, --full, --check-only, --json, --format, --output | Run environment and runtime checks |
| `grant-device-permissions` | - | --device, --operator-package | Re-grant accessibility and notification permissions |
| `version` | - | --check-compat, --device, --operator-package, --help, --device-id, --receiver-package, --json, --output, --log-level, --timeout, --timeout-ms, --verbose, --version | Show the CLI version |

## Setup

| Command | Aliases | Flags | Summary |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `operator` | - | --apk, --device, --operator-package, --help<br>Subcommands: setup, install | Install the Operator APK and configure the device |
| `setup` | - | --apk, --device, --operator-package | Alias guidance - use operator setup instead |
| `install` | - | --apk, --device, --operator-package | Alias guidance - use operator setup instead |
| `doctor` | - | --fix, --full, --check-only, --json, --format, --output | Run environment and runtime checks |
| `grant-device-permissions` | - | --device, --operator-package | Re-grant accessibility and notification permissions |
| `version` | - | --check-compat, --device, --operator-package, --help, --device-id, --receiver-package, --json, --output, --log-level, --timeout, --timeout-ms, --verbose, --version | Show the CLI version |

### `operator`

- Summary: Install the Operator APK and configure the device
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--apk`, `--device`, `--operator-package`, `--help`
- Subcommands: `setup`, `install`

### `setup`

- Summary: Alias guidance - use operator setup instead
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--apk`, `--device`, `--operator-package`

### `install`

- Summary: Alias guidance - use operator setup instead
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--apk`, `--device`, `--operator-package`

### `doctor`

- Summary: Run environment and runtime checks
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--fix`, `--full`, `--check-only`, `--json`, `--format`, `--output`

### `grant-device-permissions`

- Summary: Re-grant accessibility and notification permissions
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--device`, `--operator-package`

### `version`

- Summary: Show the CLI version
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--check-compat`, `--device`, `--operator-package`, `--help`, `--device-id`, `--receiver-package`, `--json`, `--output`, `--log-level`, `--timeout`, `--timeout-ms`, `--verbose`, `--version`

## Device Management

| Command | Aliases | Flags | Summary |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `devices` | - | - | List connected Android devices |
| `emulator` | - | --name<br>Subcommands: list, inspect, create, start, stop, delete, status, provision | Manage Android emulators (AVDs) |
| `provision` | - | -<br>Subcommands: emulator | Provision an Android emulator |
| `packages` | - | --third-party, --device, --operator-package, --payload, --execution | List installed packages on a device |

### `devices`

- Summary: List connected Android devices
- Aliases: -
- Flags: -

### `emulator`

- Summary: Manage Android emulators (AVDs)
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--name`
- Subcommands: `list`, `inspect`, `create`, `start`, `stop`, `delete`, `status`, `provision`

### `provision`

- Summary: Provision an Android emulator
- Aliases: -
- Flags: -
- Subcommands: `emulator`

### `packages`

- Summary: List installed packages on a device
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--third-party`, `--device`, `--operator-package`, `--payload`, `--execution`

## Execution

| Command | Aliases | Flags | Summary |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `exec` | execute | --payload, --execution, --validate-only, --dry-run, --goal, --device, --operator-package | Execute a validated command payload |
| `skills` | - | --app, --intent, --keyword, --skill-id, --artifact, --vars, --summary, --all, --dry-run, --device, --device-id, --operator-package, --receiver-package, --timeout, --timeout-ms, --expect-contains, --skip-validate, --ref, --json, --output<br>Subcommands: install, sync, new, validate, run | Manage and run automation skills |
| `serve` | - | --port, --host | Start local HTTP/SSE server for remote control |

### `exec`

- Summary: Execute a validated command payload
- Aliases: `execute`
- Flags: `--payload`, `--execution`, `--validate-only`, `--dry-run`, `--goal`, `--device`, `--operator-package`

### `skills`

- Summary: Manage and run automation skills
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--app`, `--intent`, `--keyword`, `--skill-id`, `--artifact`, `--vars`, `--summary`, `--all`, `--dry-run`, `--device`, `--device-id`, `--operator-package`, `--receiver-package`, `--timeout`, `--timeout-ms`, `--expect-contains`, `--skip-validate`, `--ref`, `--json`, `--output`
- Subcommands: `install`, `sync`, `new`, `validate`, `run`

### `serve`

- Summary: Start local HTTP/SSE server for remote control
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--port`, `--host`

## Device Interaction

| Command | Aliases | Flags | Summary |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `snapshot` | - | --device, --operator-package, --json | Get current Android UI hierarchy as XML |
| `screenshot` | - | --path, --device, --operator-package, --json | Capture a screenshot from the device |
| `click` | tap | --text, --text-contains, --id, --desc, --desc-contains, --role, --selector, --coordinate, --long, --focus, --device, --operator-package, --json | Tap the first matching UI element |
| `open` | open-uri, open-url | --app, --device, --operator-package, --json, --help | Open an app, URL, or URI on the device |
| `type` | fill | --text, --text-contains, --id, --desc, --desc-contains, --role, --selector, --submit, --clear, --device, --operator-package, --json, --help | Type text into the first matching UI element |
| `read` | - | --text, --text-contains, --id, --desc, --desc-contains, --role, --selector, --all, --container-text, --container-text-contains, --container-id, --container-desc, --container-desc-contains, --container-role, --container-selector, --device, --operator-package, --json | Read text from the first matching UI element |
| `wait` | - | --text, --text-contains, --id, --desc, --desc-contains, --role, --selector, --device, --operator-package, --timeout, --json | Wait until a matching UI element appears |
| `press` | press-key | --key, --device, --operator-package, --json, --help | Press a hardware key on the device |
| `back` | - | --device, --operator-package, --json, --app, --help | Press the Android back key |
| `close` | close-app | --app, --device, --operator-package, --json | Force-stop an Android application |
| `sleep` | - | --device, --operator-package, --json | Pause execution for a duration |
| `scroll` | - | --direction, --container-text, --container-text-contains, --container-id, --container-desc, --container-desc-contains, --container-role, --container-selector, --device, --operator-package, --json, --help, --click | Scroll the screen in a direction |
| `scroll-until` | - | --click, --direction, --text, --text-contains, --id, --desc, --desc-contains, --role, --selector, --container-text, --container-text-contains, --container-id, --container-desc, --container-desc-contains, --container-role, --container-selector, --device, --operator-package, --json | Scroll until a target element is visible |
| `scroll-and-click` | - | --direction, --text, --text-contains, --id, --desc, --desc-contains, --role, --selector, --container-text, --container-text-contains, --container-id, --container-desc, --container-desc-contains, --container-role, --container-selector, --click, --device, --operator-package, --json | Scroll until target is visible, then click it (alias for scroll-until --click) |
| `wait-for-nav` | wait-for-navigation | --app, --text, --text-contains, --id, --desc, --desc-contains, --role, --selector, --validate-only, --dry-run, --timeout, --device, --operator-package, --json | Wait for app or screen navigation to complete |
| `read-value` | read-kv | --label, --label-id, --label-desc, --all, --validate-only, --dry-run, --json | Read the value associated with a labeled element |

### `snapshot`

- Summary: Get current Android UI hierarchy as XML
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--device`, `--operator-package`, `--json`

### `screenshot`

- Summary: Capture a screenshot from the device
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--path`, `--device`, `--operator-package`, `--json`

### `click`

- Summary: Tap the first matching UI element
- Aliases: `tap`
- Flags: `--text`, `--text-contains`, `--id`, `--desc`, `--desc-contains`, `--role`, `--selector`, `--coordinate`, `--long`, `--focus`, `--device`, `--operator-package`, `--json`

### `open`

- Summary: Open an app, URL, or URI on the device
- Aliases: `open-uri`, `open-url`
- Flags: `--app`, `--device`, `--operator-package`, `--json`, `--help`

### `type`

- Summary: Type text into the first matching UI element
- Aliases: `fill`
- Flags: `--text`, `--text-contains`, `--id`, `--desc`, `--desc-contains`, `--role`, `--selector`, `--submit`, `--clear`, `--device`, `--operator-package`, `--json`, `--help`

### `read`

- Summary: Read text from the first matching UI element
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--text`, `--text-contains`, `--id`, `--desc`, `--desc-contains`, `--role`, `--selector`, `--all`, `--container-text`, `--container-text-contains`, `--container-id`, `--container-desc`, `--container-desc-contains`, `--container-role`, `--container-selector`, `--device`, `--operator-package`, `--json`

### `wait`

- Summary: Wait until a matching UI element appears
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--text`, `--text-contains`, `--id`, `--desc`, `--desc-contains`, `--role`, `--selector`, `--device`, `--operator-package`, `--timeout`, `--json`

### `press`

- Summary: Press a hardware key on the device
- Aliases: `press-key`
- Flags: `--key`, `--device`, `--operator-package`, `--json`, `--help`

### `back`

- Summary: Press the Android back key
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--device`, `--operator-package`, `--json`, `--app`, `--help`

### `close`

- Summary: Force-stop an Android application
- Aliases: `close-app`
- Flags: `--app`, `--device`, `--operator-package`, `--json`

### `sleep`

- Summary: Pause execution for a duration
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--device`, `--operator-package`, `--json`

### `scroll`

- Summary: Scroll the screen in a direction
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--direction`, `--container-text`, `--container-text-contains`, `--container-id`, `--container-desc`, `--container-desc-contains`, `--container-role`, `--container-selector`, `--device`, `--operator-package`, `--json`, `--help`, `--click`

### `scroll-until`

- Summary: Scroll until a target element is visible
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--click`, `--direction`, `--text`, `--text-contains`, `--id`, `--desc`, `--desc-contains`, `--role`, `--selector`, `--container-text`, `--container-text-contains`, `--container-id`, `--container-desc`, `--container-desc-contains`, `--container-role`, `--container-selector`, `--device`, `--operator-package`, `--json`

### `scroll-and-click`

- Summary: Scroll until target is visible, then click it (alias for scroll-until --click)
- Aliases: -
- Flags: `--direction`, `--text`, `--text-contains`, `--id`, `--desc`, `--desc-contains`, `--role`, `--selector`, `--container-text`, `--container-text-contains`, `--container-id`, `--container-desc`, `--container-desc-contains`, `--container-role`, `--container-selector`, `--click`, `--device`, `--operator-package`, `--json`

### `wait-for-nav`

- Summary: Wait for app or screen navigation to complete
- Aliases: `wait-for-navigation`
- Flags: `--app`, `--text`, `--text-contains`, `--id`, `--desc`, `--desc-contains`, `--role`, `--selector`, `--validate-only`, `--dry-run`, `--timeout`, `--device`, `--operator-package`, `--json`

### `read-value`

- Summary: Read the value associated with a labeled element
- Aliases: `read-kv`
- Flags: `--label`, `--label-id`, `--label-desc`, `--all`, `--validate-only`, `--dry-run`, `--json`

## Recording

| Command | Aliases | Flags | Summary |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `recording` | record | --session-id, --out, --input, --device, --operator-package | Manage recording sessions on the Operator app |

### `recording`

- Summary: Manage recording sessions on the Operator app
- Aliases: `record`
- Flags: `--session-id`, `--out`, `--input`, `--device`, `--operator-package`

# Actions

Placeholder for the action reference.

Each action, its required inputs, outputs, and common failure modes will live here.

---

# Selectors

Placeholder for the selector contract.

| Flag | Description | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `--selector` | Raw NodeMatcher JSON for an element. | Mutually exclusive with shorthand element selector flags. |
| `--text` | Element selector flag. | May be combined with other shorthand selector flags. |
| `--text-contains` | Element selector flag. | May be combined with other shorthand selector flags. |
| `--id` | Element selector flag. | May be combined with other shorthand selector flags. |
| `--desc` | Element selector flag. | May be combined with other shorthand selector flags. |
| `--desc-contains` | Element selector flag. | May be combined with other shorthand selector flags. |
| `--role` | Element selector flag. | May be combined with other shorthand selector flags. |
| `--container-selector` | Raw NodeMatcher JSON for a container. | Mutually exclusive with raw selector JSON on the same matcher. |
| `--container-text` | Container selector flag. | Mutually exclusive with raw selector JSON on the same matcher. |
| `--container-text-contains` | Container selector flag. | Mutually exclusive with raw selector JSON on the same matcher. |
| `--container-id` | Container selector flag. | Mutually exclusive with raw selector JSON on the same matcher. |
| `--container-desc` | Container selector flag. | Mutually exclusive with raw selector JSON on the same matcher. |
| `--container-desc-contains` | Container selector flag. | Mutually exclusive with raw selector JSON on the same matcher. |
| `--container-role` | Container selector flag. | Mutually exclusive with raw selector JSON on the same matcher. |

This page will define the NodeMatcher contract, selector flag behavior, and matching rules.

---

# Snapshot Format

Placeholder for the snapshot format reference.

This page will describe the snapshot output shape and parsing contract.

---

# Errors

Placeholder for the error reference.

| Code | Meaning | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `HOST_DEPENDENCY_MISSING` | Host dependency missing | Host |
| `ADB_NOT_FOUND` | Adb not found | Setup & Connectivity |
| `NO_DEVICES` | No devices | - |
| `MULTIPLE_DEVICES_DEVICE_ID_REQUIRED` | Multiple devices device id required | Recovery: pass `--device` (alias `--device-id`) when adb shows multiple targets. |
| `OPERATOR_NOT_INSTALLED` | Operator not installed | - |
| `DEVICE_NOT_FOUND` | Device not found | Recovery: the `--device` serial is not connected (alias `--device-id`). |
| `EXECUTION_VALIDATION_FAILED` | Execution validation failed | Execution & State |
| `EXECUTION_ACTION_UNSUPPORTED` | Execution action unsupported | - |
| `EXECUTION_CONFLICT_IN_FLIGHT` | Execution conflict in flight | - |
| `RESULT_ENVELOPE_TIMEOUT` | Result envelope timeout | - |
| `RESULT_ENVELOPE_MALFORMED` | Result envelope malformed | - |
| `SNAPSHOT_EXTRACTION_FAILED` | Snapshot extraction failed | - |
| `MISSING_ARGUMENT` | Missing argument | CLI Usage |
| `NODE_NOT_FOUND` | Node not found | UI & Nodes |
| `NODE_NOT_CLICKABLE` | Node not clickable | - |
| `SECURITY_BLOCK_DETECTED` | Security block detected | - |
| `CONTAINER_NOT_FOUND` | Container not found | - |
| `CONTAINER_NOT_SCROLLABLE` | Container not scrollable | - |
| `GESTURE_FAILED` | Gesture failed | - |
| `NODE_TOO_OLD` | Node too old | Doctor & Host |
| `ADB_SERVER_FAILED` | Adb server failed | - |
| `ADB_NO_USB_PERMISSIONS` | Adb no usb permissions | - |
| `DEVICE_UNAUTHORIZED` | Device unauthorized | - |
| `DEVICE_OFFLINE` | Device offline | - |
| `DEVICE_SHELL_UNAVAILABLE` | Device shell unavailable | - |
| `OPERATOR_VARIANT_MISMATCH` | Operator variant mismatch | Installed release/debug Operator APK variant does not match `--operator-package`. |
| `DEVICE_DEV_OPTIONS_DISABLED` | Device dev options disabled | - |
| `DEVICE_USB_DEBUGGING_DISABLED` | Device usb debugging disabled | - |
| `DEVICE_ACCESSIBILITY_NOT_RUNNING` | Device accessibility not running | - |
| `ANDROID_BUILD_FAILED` | Android build failed | - |
| `ANDROID_INSTALL_FAILED` | Android install failed | - |
| `ANDROID_APP_LAUNCH_FAILED` | Android app launch failed | - |
| `SMOKE_OPEN_SETTINGS_FAILED` | Smoke open settings failed | - |
| `SCRCPY_NOT_FOUND` | Scrcpy not found | - |
| `APK_VERSION_UNREADABLE` | Apk version unreadable | - |
| `APK_VERSION_INVALID` | Apk version invalid | - |
| `CLI_VERSION_INVALID` | Cli version invalid | - |
| `VERSION_INCOMPATIBLE` | Version incompatible | - |
| `LOGCAT_UNAVAILABLE` | Logcat unavailable | - |
| `ANDROID_SDK_TOOL_MISSING` | Android sdk tool missing | - |
| `EMULATOR_NOT_FOUND` | Emulator not found | - |
| `EMULATOR_ALREADY_RUNNING` | Emulator already running | - |
| `EMULATOR_NOT_RUNNING` | Emulator not running | - |
| `EMULATOR_UNSUPPORTED` | Emulator unsupported | - |
| `EMULATOR_CREATE_FAILED` | Emulator create failed | - |
| `EMULATOR_START_FAILED` | Emulator start failed | - |
| `EMULATOR_STOP_FAILED` | Emulator stop failed | - |
| `EMULATOR_DELETE_FAILED` | Emulator delete failed | - |
| `EMULATOR_BOOT_TIMEOUT` | Emulator boot timeout | - |
| `ANDROID_SYSTEM_IMAGE_INSTALL_FAILED` | Android system image install failed | - |
| `ANDROID_AVD_CREATE_FAILED` | Android avd create failed | - |
| `OPERATOR_APK_NOT_FOUND` | Operator apk not found | Operator install |
| `OPERATOR_INSTALL_FAILED` | Operator install failed | - |
| `OPERATOR_GRANT_FAILED` | Operator grant failed | - |
| `OPERATOR_VERIFY_FAILED` | Operator verify failed | - |
| `RECORDING_ALREADY_IN_PROGRESS` | Recording already in progress | Recording |
| `RECORDING_NOT_IN_PROGRESS` | Recording not in progress | - |
| `RECORDING_SESSION_NOT_FOUND` | Recording session not found | - |
| `RECORDING_PULL_FAILED` | Recording pull failed | - |
| `RECORDING_PARSE_FAILED` | Recording parse failed | - |
| `RECORDING_SCHEMA_VERSION_UNSUPPORTED` | Recording schema version unsupported | - |
| `BROADCAST_FAILED` | Broadcast failed | ADB broadcast dispatch to the Operator package failed. |
| `PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE` | Payload too large | - |
| `DOCTOR_FAILED` | Doctor failed | - |

This page will explain error classes, recovery patterns, and code-derived error codes.
